programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: No thief has ever succeeded in stealing the secret gem of Pompeii's nunnery; it's guarded by venomous snakes. Even Arsene Lupin gave up on it, since he hates snakes. But Lupin takes on the challenge. Will Lupin succeed? And what kind of secret gem is it?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Though the tycoon Steel had replaced all his bodily organs with artificial organs to live, he's told that he only has a week to live. There is only one way he could prolong his life, which is to receive a brain transplant and he wants Lupin's Brain.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Famous gourmand and field mice scientist Salmon Whitney is also known as being the chairman of a Canadian diamond mining operation. Lupin is after his diamonds, which will go on auction in Paris.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Coaxed by Fujiko, Lupin decides to steal the diamond chandelier at the Kremlin Palace. He disguises himself as Zenigata and infiltrates the palace, but government police soldier Natasha captures him and throws him in the slammer.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: England's Lord Weather provokes Lupin with a bet, and dares him to steal Red Arrow away from him. Lupin takes the challenge as it's a matter of pride, but Jigen wants no part of it because he and Weather are gambling buddies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Miami Bank is on the verge of bankruptcy after its last customers closed their accounts. The bank manager Garlic devises a plan to revive the bank, and drums up news that his bank had been raided by Lupin; he also asks Lupin to really do it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Thief brothers Nanja-Monja have been in the business since the days of Arsène Lupin; they decide to induct Lupin as a tourist attraction for the Republic of Karchina. But first they abduct Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko joins Lupin and gang who are camping and cooking Sukiyaki; people are hunting Fujiko, and gunfire is exchanged. Fujiko gets captured and Lupin's Sukiyaki meal gets ruined, but he finds an atomic bomb's detonator plug inside of the Sukiyaki bowl.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Genius prodigy boy Romanoff has ten doctorates from Russia's Public Academy; blustering that no greater than he exists, he challenges Lupin. Since Fujiko is involved, Lupin cannot back down; what will become of this challenge?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko is the model for Norway's famous sculptor Vingel's crystal mermaid statue; she believed when he said he would give it to her the day it was finished, but Vingel gets greedy and sells it to the mayor of the city of Bergen instead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin tries to steal a bunch of diamonds from a diamond auction. But the auction auditorium is at the Marine Tower above a skyscraper, and there is only one transparent elevator to get there.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin heads to Mecca to steal Mohammed's treasure. But first he is confronted by Patra Lawrence, the grandaughter of the Lawrence of Arabia, who is the chief of Mecca's special police headquarters; how will Lupin steal the treasure now?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: As usual, Fujiko instigates Lupin and friends to go steal; this time their target is the Jovich Piano installed in a music hall built around it. There is no door large enough in the hall to carry the piano out.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the shipment of raw diamonds that arrived at a harbor in Nice; he sneaks into the storage in the middle of the night but Zenigata was on to him. Lupin escapes with the help of Jigen and Goemon, but Fujiko gets captured.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A month ago, president Gappolini of one of the world's top five trading companies, had died. Gappolini bequeathed a will saying that the heir to the company presidency will be the world's finest sharpshooter and Jigen is a target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: It's said that immense sums of money confiscated from organized crime get transported to a Swiss bank by ICPO, once a year. Naturally, Lupin wants a piece of that action, so he steals the armed security vehicle along with Zenigata in it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The city of Grand Hexagon lies at the border of France and Spain; the city is designed with six sides. But at the center of the city is Raika Bank storing fifty tons of gold bullion; an alarm will go off if even one bullion is missing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Robot soldier Lamda flies above the sky of Tokyo, raids a jewelry store. Its creator, professor Oyamada's daughter Maki and Lupin say that it was just a show to demonstrate the inhumanity of robots.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd: Voyage to Danger
programme.desc: Someone sent orders to assassinate Lupin. Will he survive or die trying!?

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #6 Dragon of Doom
programme.desc: On the bottom of the ocean, within the sunken Titanic, the golden dragon statue waits. When Lupin and the gang are hired to retrieve it, Goemon recognizes the dragon as one of his clan's treasures. Now, he's ready to fight his own friends to protect it!

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #7 The Pursuit of Harimao's Treasure
programme.desc: To retrieve the Harimao's Treasure, Lupin and the gang must gather three lost statues. Lupin reluctantly partners with the aging "double-O" MI-6 agent Sir Archer and his granddaughter Diana to gather the statues.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/20/22: On a brisk autumn night, Aaron Judge suddenly is one home run shy of Roger Maris' record and sparks an epic Yankees' comeback against the Pirates. Giancarlo Stanton feels the electric momentum and walks it off with a grand slam in the Bronx.

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: The American League and National League face off in a pitching duel for four innings of the 1980 All-Star Game until Fred Lynn crushes a two-run homer. The NL would take the lead for good in the 6th.

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: The 1986 All-Star Game resulted in an American League win that ended the National League's streak of winning the last 13 of 14 All-Star Games. Lou Whitaker and Frank White homered in the AL's 3-2 victory and Roger Clemens was named MVP.

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: The National League battles back twice late in a thrilling victory, highlighted by clutch hits from Fred McGriff and Moises Alou. The 1994 MLB All-Star Game was the first NL win since 1987.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: On Opening Day in 1994, Doc Gooden took on the Cubs at Wrigley Field. The story, however, wasn't about the Mets' 12-8 win. To Cubs fans, it is known as the Tuffy Rhodes Game. Rhodes shocked the Friendly Confines by hitting three homers off Gooden.

programme.title: MST3K: Parts: The Clonus Horror
programme.desc: Scientists run a clone farm for VIPs while Pearl and her goons are forced into babysitting omnipotent Space Children.

programme.title: MST3K: Project Moonbase
programme.desc: Joel and the Bots watch two more Commando Cody episodes and a film about a sabotaged space station. They also introduce their new product SPACOM to the Mads.

programme.title: MST3K: Quest Of The Delta Knights
programme.desc: Pearl sits in on part of this week's experiment as part of her annual review, and Leonardo da Vinci stops by.

programme.title: MST3K: Robot Holocaust
programme.desc: After the ninth chapter of Radar Men From The Moon (1952) ends in technical difficulties, Joel and the bots must endure Robot Holocaust (1986). They pretend to be characters from the movie, but Tom Servo is the only one who is into it.

programme.title: MST3K: Robot Monster: MST3K: Robot Monster
programme.desc: The guys watch a post-apocalyptic film about aliens and robots, riff on two more installments of "Radar Men from the Moon", and try to understand surrealism.

programme.title: MST3K: Santa Claus Conquers The Martians
programme.desc: Martians abduct Santa Claus and two human children in hopes of bringing Christmas to their planet.

programme.title: Side Hackers
programme.desc: A motorcycle racer and a violent stunt rider start a war of vengeance against each other. Joel and the Bots write a song inspired by the movie and chat with a few characters from the film on the Hexfield.

programme.title: MST3K: Star Force: Fugitive Alien II
programme.desc: Ken and the crew of the Bacchus 3 return in Star Force: Fugitive Alien II (1987) while Joel and the Bots make a Captain Joe action figure and stage a "name that puppet" quiz show.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Llega el boss, es italiano y tiene carácter, comienza regañándolos y los envía a trabajar crudos. Isaac está de cumpleaños y recibe muchos regalos, incluido el de Adela. Elettra come una pizza que la pone cachonda. Una gran alegría llega a Rimini.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Hay tensión en la casa, Adela está de malas con Elettra que no entiende cual es el problema, pero el problema es que ella se está ligando a Isaac adelante e Adela y a este parece no importarle.Victor y Potro se dicen sus verdades.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Karime y Elettra arman un plan para ligarse a Ferre y a Isaac delante de Adela y Eva porque no les gusta su actitud irrespetuosa, estas dos están un poco sorprendidas por lo que pasa y no saben bien como enfrentarlo.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Las vacaciones van a tope para todos menos para Eva que parece no disfrutar lo que está viviendo, ni la llegada de su amigo Pietro logra sacarle el mood negativo a la francesa de fuego. Al mismo tiempo la casa está en shock por un chisme.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los shore llegan a Roma. Hay discusiones por ver quién se queda con quién en el hotel. Potro está molesto porque Karime y Elettra se quedan con Víctor y se roban el cuarto del amor. Toda la belleza romana invadida porn los shores que cantan.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Mucha tensión en las mini vacaciones en Roma, Potro parece alejarse definitivamente de Karime y gasta una broma al grupo muy pesada. Danik y Elettra finalmente chocan en una pelea dura que divide a la casa.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: El clima enrarecido cambia una vez más con la llegada de Tadeo a la costa adriátrica, es que Ursulo media muy bien entre todos y de a poco se gana al grupo y lo une, además se gana el corazón de Elettra que muere por él.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La familia vive un viaje a Venecia a tope, junto con Tadeo y Paula la nueva integrante de la familia. Por la noche en Venecia, algo pasa en la habitación de las chicas que traerá cola y que nadie puede terminar de confirmar muy bien

programme.title: Catfish Colombia

programme.title: Catfish Colombia

programme.title: Catfish México

programme.title: Catfish México

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Maggie Stewart is dressed as Mr. McFeely and delivers a film about how people make sweaters. The children put on a play about a princess, a raccoon and a giant king. Prince Tuesday admits he had something to do with the missing crown.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers sees Bob Trow paint a portrait of Mr. McFeely. Robert Troll paints a portrait of King Friday who asks Lady Aberlin to have everyone copy it for themselves. Lady Aberlin explains that art comes from within each person.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a wooden toy airplane. Handyman Negri is working on a musical portrait of King Friday. Neighbor Aber provides his own tribute to King Friday as he mans his plane and draws a sky-written portrait of the King.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a picture of a blue tree. In art, you can make things any way you want. He also talks about visiting art museums.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers "colors a song" by playing music by Mozart to inspire his artwork. King Friday is curious about a delivery to X the Owl labelled "Deliver to X the Owl ONLY."

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers delights in a visitor who can whistle, especially because that's something Mister Rogers hasn't been able to learn. Nobody can do everything!

programme.desc: Mister Rogers blows some bubbles and calls a plumber because the water in his house isn't working.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Emotional Jamie is torn between her husband and her live-in boyfriend. She says she loves them both and is not even sure whose baby she is carrying! Next Dana and Steve are here to convince their daughter that she cannot marry her cousin!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Have Two Husbands
programme.desc: Jessica married Gian after a five month relationship. With a baby on the way, everything seems to be going great for the couple, except Jessica is married to another man, Michael!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Jason believes his girlfriend has been cheating. She admits to being unfaithful in the beginning but claims she has not cheated in four years. Then, Marcus heard rumors that his wife is sleeping with co-workers and strange men in parking lots.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Avonte was diagnosed with cancer that had him hospitalized for almost a year. His aunt, Terceira, started a fundraiser to help. But now Avonte and his mother are saying that they never received any money and they believe that Terceira kept it.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Ashley and DeNorris accuse each other of cheating. Later, Jim denies serious allegations with his fiancee's sister and other young girls.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m Not the Man You Think I Am
programme.desc: Sean says his wife has made him so angry that he’s put her in the hospital over 10 times. Sean’s also got a secret of his own—he is really a she! Can Steve help Sean iron out his issues?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Shane suspected that Toni cheated on her after she came home with a damaged car. He installed a GPS tracker on her phone to prove his suspicions. Plus, Shay wants to confess a secret to her husband Maurice today!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Look What You Did to Your Baby
programme.desc: Kristy wants her baby back from her mother Donna! Donna claims she took the baby away because he was born with severe disabilities due to Kristy’s drug use during pregnancy. Who’s the liar?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him
programme.desc: Will Nadia and Woody's lie detector test results prove that they were negligent and deserved to lose custody of their children? Then, can Steve set the record straight about Josette's daughter?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Rachelle believes that her man Chris may be cheating with as many as 50 women, including her sister! Then, Carrie was shocked when she found out that her man Chris lied about his military service.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: John aspires to be a rapper and says Dabria wants to trap him with someone else's baby due to his future success. Then, can a mom keep her daughter away from her controlling boyfriend? Later, is Kelly's very sick baby Brandon's?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Kyle denies that he fathered Citasia’s child. His mom says that he’s lying. Then, Josh fathered 5 kids. Dana says that he better prepare for number 6 because she claims he’s the father of her baby!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: According to Dennis, ex-girlfriend Kendal refuses to let him go and keeps him around by lying about being pregnant. He wants to know if their daughter is even his! Will Steve's DNA test results finally let them move on?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Roxanne and Andrew have 2 kids together. Andrew says he's worried she's been cheating on him and doesn't know if the kids are his! Can Steve's test results save their relationship?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Jessica can't make sense of her on again off again relationship with Wade and it's starting to drive her crazy. Wade however claims he's had nothing to do with Jessica and she's been spreading lies and stalking him for years.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: A man has an affair with his fiancee's friend; a woman confronts her husband and his mistress; a man tries to mend his relationship with his wife; a man sees another woman after his wife's family kicks him out of their house.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Kiki y su hermana Sad-e aseguran que el novio de Kiki, Tavon, es un infiel. ¿Qué dirán cuando aparezca en nuestra cámara oculta? Entonces, ¿los hijos de James y Nikkie son realmente suyos?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Keisha sabe que Desmond es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero él la quiere fuera de su vida! Después, dos madres desesperadas se enfrentan al padre de sus tres hijos.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: La furiosa mamá Patty quiere demostrar que el novio de su hija, Dale, un hombre que duplica la edad de su hija, ha sido infiel. ¿Entonces Bam fue infiel a Brianna en su propia cama?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Grace, la madre de Eddie, no los va a dejar vivir con ella a menos que Kay Kay pueda demostrar que su hijo, Eddie, es el padre de su nieto. Después, Troy niega ser el padre de los cinco hijos de Vanessa.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Estas mujeres han venido con preguntas urgentes! Kendra quiere que su esposo Richard admita que es el padre de su hijo Y del hijo de su amante! ¡Jevon y su familia no creen que él sea el padre del hijo de Jazmine! ¡Solo MAURY tiene las respuestas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: En el episodio de hoy de MAURY, estos hombres dicen que saben que la prueba de paternidad demostrará lo que siempre han sabido: que no son padres de los hijos de las mujeres que los trajeron aquí. ¡Ellas van a demostrar que están equivocados!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Centavia sospecha que su novio Richard la engaña con Kheisha, la niñera. Después, Kristy le revelará 2 secretos a su novio Matt que podrían terminar su relación. ¡Descubre estos secretos impactantes hoy!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Los huéspedes de MAURY han estado ocultando secretos horribles de sus seres queridos y eso les está desgarrando por dentro. ¡Están listos para confesar, incluso si eso les hace perder sus relaciones! ¿Se quedarán o se irán sus seres queridos?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy en MAURY, te pondremos al día con algunos de nuestros invitados más emocionantes. Los resultados de paternidad asombraron a todo el mundo. ¿Qué pasó después de revelar las respuestas y que estos invitados retomaron sus vidas?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Rhonda está segura de que John es el padre de su hijo. ¡Incluso la mamá de John está de acuerdo con ella! Después, Kim y Heather solían ser amigas, pero eso fue antes de que Rick la dejara por Heather. Sin embargo, Kim está segura de que Rick es el padre.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy, Marisol regresa por 12º vez para hacer la prueba de su 15º hombre. Luego, Dalyna vino a demostrar que Johnny Mack es el padre de su hijo. Él dice que es imposible porque le parece que el bebé es "demasiado feo" para ser suyo.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy, en MAURY, terminó la espera. Finalmente mostramos los resultados emocionantes de las pruebas de paternidad de ayer. Además, las nuevas parejas están cruzando los dedos para recibir las respuestas que quieren.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Los invitados del episodio de hoy de MAURY tienen secretos que revelar, pero ¿se arrepentirán de contarlos? Hay relaciones en peligro. Puede que haya corazones rotos. ¿Podrán estas parejas sobrevivir a los secretos que amenazan con separarlos?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy en MAURY, tenemos a madres y padres muy enfadados en negación. ¡Estos hombres juran que es imposible que sean los padres de los hijos de estas mujeres! Pero, ¿y si tienen razón? ¿Qué respuestas darán los resultados de ADN?

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Morgana quiere matar a Willy para que su hija pueda recibir la herencia, pero Margot la detiene, pidiéndole que mate a Mariana en su lugar. Morgana explica que si hacen eso, ella será la primera sospechosa.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio tiene en sus manos a Rosaura, con la excusa de entregarle a su hija. Luis Mario le promete a Maribella que le va a devolver todo el dinero que pagó por la hacienda.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura y Camelia están dentro de la piscina, peleándose. Eduarda le comenta a Luis Mario que sigue enamorada de Patricio y que él debe olvidar a Rosaura y dedicarse a Maribella.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura ve a Sonia y comienza a gritar, después choca contra un poste Jimena le dice a Iván que en la vida de ellos hay una realidad que es Adriana y Guillermo. Rosaura recupera el conocimiento.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Marfil le confiesa a Diego las razones por las que se casó con Pedro, y Diego le hace una propuesta. Las hermanas Velasco descubren los secretos de Pancholón. Larry llama buscando a Sharon y le dice a Gaby que ya no piensa más en ella.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Fedora descubre las conversaciones entre Sharon y Kike. Sharon al saberlo, actúa violentamente contra Fedora. Maximiliano le pide a Marcela que se vean. Ignacio se encuentra a Diana en la calle y la ataca.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: El doctor Quintana descubre la picadura de araña de Fedora y les da una mala noticia. Kike llama a Gaby para decirle que él sabe dónde se esconde Sharon tras su acto criminal contra Fedora.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Gaviota le pregunta a Paco si perdió a su hijo para salvar su vida. Sharon es internada en un hospital psiquiátrico. Fedora descubre que tiene las piernas paralizadas.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Morgana quiere matar a Willy para que su hija pueda recibir la herencia, pero Margot la detiene, pidiéndole que mate a Mariana en su lugar. Morgana explica que si hacen eso, ella será la primera sospechosa.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Willy encuentra a Mariana en brazos de Martin y le provoca una crisis de celos. Martin lo pone en su lugar y Santiago le recuerda a Willy que no puede seguir interfiriendo y que está casado con Margot.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Willy resulta herido por Picos, quien por las órdenes de Morgana le dispara sin matarlo. Margot se vuelve histérica a medida que la ayuda médica llega, aterrorizada de que se pueda morir.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Margot y Willy discuten, pues él sospecha de Morgana y Margot sospecha de Mariana, las que pudieron haber sido, las que atentaron contra su vida. A fin de cuentas, Margot consigue que Willy se disculpe.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Captain Smoker has Luffy in his grasp until a fiery stranger creates a diversion, giving the Straw Hats a chance to make a break for it.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ace and Luffy’s happy reunion is crudely interrupted by the Billions of Baroque Works. They may be outnumbered, but these brothers are no ordinary pirates!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Before they can start their trek across the desert, Luffy and the Straw Hats are stopped at the shore by the cute – but formidable – Kung Fu Dugongs.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s crew encounters treacherous birds and man-eating foliage on its desert odyssey, and just when they think the coast is clear, a great disturbance emerges from beneath the sand!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats cross paths with the Barbar Sand Pirates, and Ace runs into big trouble when he gets separated from the group.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Princess Vivi devises a plan to test the hearts of a gang of so-called rebels. They talk a good game, but will their bite measure up to their bark?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats continue their journey to Yuba, where a bittersweet reunion with a childhood friend awaits Princess Vivi.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Fire Fist Ace is hired by two young boys to hunt down and capture a lethal bounty hunter known only as the Scorpion.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper, Zoro, and Luffy get separated from the others. When the heat makes Luffy act even stranger than usual, his friends wonder if they joined the right pirate gang.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The assassins of Baroque Works gather at Spider’s Café, and the Straw Hats arrive at Yuba only to find it buried in sand.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Crocodile reveals himself to the Baroque Works assassins and discloses his dastardly plan for Alabasta. After departing Yuba, Luffy takes a stand that forces Vivi to rethink her mission.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Vivi takes Luffy’s advice, and the Straw Hats head towards Rainbase for a confrontation with Crocodile. Karoo finally reaches the palace with Vivi’s warning for King Cobra.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy leads a daring – but foolish – raid on Crocodile’s casino. His poor planning lands him behind bars with Captain Smoker – and more importantly, leaves Vivi unprotected.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the Straw Hats are stuck in the clink, King Cobra addresses the starving people of Nanohana. Will his unbelievable revelation drive his subjects past the brink of rebellion?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A royal imposter has the rebel army hell-bent on bringing Cobra’s reign to a violent end. Meanwhile, Luffy and his mates find themselves in deep trouble and even deeper water.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji shows up in the nick of time to make the crocs cough up the key to Luffy’s freedom, but the ravenous reptiles spit up something else instead.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Crocodile snatches Vivi off the back of a giant crab, but Luffy’s not having it. The rubber-man goes toe-to-toe with the sandman in a battle that will end in bloodshed.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Crocodile puts Luffy down for a never-ending dirt nap, and the Straw Hats get a lift from a crabby ally in their race to stop the looming rebellion.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Vivi arrives in Alubarna with just enough time to stop the rebellion, but the agents of Baroque Works lurk in every corner, waiting to sabotage her plans for peace.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji buys Vivi some time by mixing it up with a foe of many faces. Outside Alubarna’s walls, Chopper and Usopp tangle with Miss Merry Christmas and her slugging sidekick.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp finally shows some courage by using a five-ton hammer to play whack-a-mole with Miss Merry Christmas. He may be bluffing, but the distraction lets Chopper zero in on the enemy’s weakness.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper’s Rumble Ball could be the difference between life and death in the mole ballgame. Elsewhere, Sanji has trouble kicking a pretty enemy, and Vivi proposes something unthinkable.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Vivi continues preparations to blow up the palace; Zorro puts his steel to the test against a lethal blade-man; Sanji tries to overcome his inability to kick a foxy lady!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Things don’t look good for the prettiest Straw Hat. Nami’s about to tangle with a thorny adversary, and the weapon Usopp built her is only good for party tricks!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Crocodile reveals his sinister motives for attacking Alabasta, and Nami tries to end her duel with Miss Doublefinger by unleashing the Clima Tact’s ultimate weapon: a devastatingly lethal tornado!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro hopes to attain a new level of strength when he fights a foe with a body made of blades. The Straw Hat sword-slinger is determined to become a man who can cut steel – or die trying.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Koza – the leader of the rebel army – finally discovers the evil mastermind behind Alabasta’s drought, but is he too late to prevent further bloodshed?

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: An attempt is made to fix the blinking sun of Seefra, but Trance is replaced by a doppelganger.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: When Dylan is badly injured in a lab explosion, he travels through a series of alternate realities.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Rommie is rebuilt to help evacuate the Seefra system.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A warlord convinces his followers that the approaching destruction of the outer planets is a plot to make it easier to loot their planet.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The crew finally makes it out of the Seefra system, and discover Dylan is the last Paradine; the World Ship wasn't destroyed, and Nietzscheans have begun their plan to destroy Earth.

programme.desc: As a young couple is about to tie the knot, Johnny has a troubling vision of their future and must find a way to reveal what he sees.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Nikola Tesla sends a distress call to the team, and they track him to the Colombian highlands, where they encounter deadly multipedes. Meanwhile, Bigfoot and Kate learn that a long-time friend has been murdered in Old City.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A witness comes face to face with the killer of a small-town beautician, but despite having an eyewitness, it would take years and a surprise tip to lead detectives to who strangled a beloved member of the community.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a 4-year-old finds his great-grandparents melted, he runs for help, launching an investigation into their double murder; greed takes center stage as detectives unwind this heart-wrenching case that leads them to a suspect no one saw coming.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A young woman disappears, leaving the community hoping for her safe return; when she is found murdered, a string of mysterious anonymous tips takes detectives into a toxic world of jealousy and obsession.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A missing persons case becomes something much darker when a sick, sinister affair is uncovered, leading investigators to believe foul play is involved.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: The mysterious shooting of a restaurateur with no solid suspects and no murder weapon leaves detectives in a lurch, but when financial motives come to light, an undercover operation and clever forensic investigation turn the case upside-down.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A military veteran is missing and a young student is murdered in what appears to be a crime of passion, but the discovery of a secret payout leads police on a wild chase.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: Passions and obsessions turn toxic when a beautiful young law student is found murdered and left in a trash can, leaving police to decipher a web of boyfriends, exes and unrequited lovers.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood

programme.title: FBI

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team races to stop an active serial killer after three women are found weighted down at the bottom of a lake, and Jubal looks into an old closed case after there are multiple similarities to the recent victims.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When the leader of a drug cartel and one of the world's most wanted men, Antonio Vargas, is apprehended by the team, the entire FBI headquarters is put at risk when his henchmen unveil a terroristic threat to free him.

programme.title: FBI

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The murder of a researcher leads the FBI on an investigation of a killer and a human skull.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team must find the serial arsonist responsible for an innocent man's death.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a fellow FBI agent working undercover is killed in a gang retaliation, Don and his team must investigate.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A murder of a young student at a card club leads the FBI to uncover a deadly card counting scheme.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The agents must stop an organ trafficking ring when they discover a young immigrant girl died while selling one of her kidneys.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A Cal Sci science student becomes the suspect when an expensive piece of equipment is stolen from the school's DNA lab.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: An anti-war bombing that kills an innocent man becomes personal when the investigation reveals surprising information about Don and Charlie's father's past.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Elena goes undercover as an exotic dancer at a club where a missing stripper, Cindy Peterson, worked, while Danny poses as one of her customers.

programme.desc: Michael Mann directs this stylishly photographed action-packed drama that stars James Caan as a master safe cracker who is planning his last heist for the sake of a woman (Tuesday Weld).

programme.desc: A pair of bumbling criminals kidnap a woman for ransom money, but they soon realize they've made a huge mistake when they learn she is a surrogate for a ruthless mob boss.

programme.title: Bandits
programme.desc: The suave Joe and his hypochondriac partner Terry have escaped from prison. Cutting a swath from Oregon through California, these fugitives rob banks in order to finance their scheme for a new life south of the Border.

programme.title: The Boondock Saints
programme.desc: Two Irish Catholic brothers become vigilantes and wipe out Boston's criminal underworld in the name of God.

programme.title: Bound

programme.title: Thelma & Louise

programme.title: Bound
programme.desc: Caesar’s a guy who launders money for the mob. What’s the last thing that would come between a sleazy wise guy like Caesar and that money? A couple of women with brains to die for and bodies to match.

programme.title: Hard Eight

programme.title: Chicago
programme.desc: Winner of 6 Academy Awards, including Best Picture, and based on the hit Broadway musical, Chicago is a dazzling spectacle cheered by audiences and critics alike, where crimes of passion make way for legends to those seeking the spotlight.

programme.title: House of Gucci
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of the family behind the Italian fashion empire. When Patrizia Reggiani marries into the Gucci family, her unbridled ambition begins to unravel the family legacy and triggers a spiral of betrayal, decadence, and murder.

programme.title: A Chance Encounter
programme.desc: In a Sicilian town an aspiring poet in search of inspiration meets a folk singer.

programme.desc: From director George Clooney, Suburbicon is the perfect place for Gardner Lodge (Matt Damon) to raise a family. But the tranquil surface masks a disturbing reality, as Gardner must navigate the town's dark underbelly of betrayal, deceit, and violence.

programme.title: School Ties
programme.desc: After receiving a scholarship to an exclusive prep school, working-class teen David Greene becomes a star athlete and wins the attention of a beautiful debutante.

programme.title: The Host
programme.desc: When an unseen enemy threatens mankind by taking over humans' bodies and erasing their minds, Melanie Stryder risks everything to protect the people she cares about most, proving that love can conquer all in a dangerous new world.

programme.title: Super 8

programme.title: Cloverfield

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Two thrill-seeking adventurers cross paths with a beautiful doctor and they find themselves on the ultimate hunt for a treasure that claims all who seek it.

programme.title: The Host

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares

programme.title: The F Word (UK)

programme.title: The F Word (UK)

programme.title: Planet Chef
programme.desc: Tempero, a restaurant focusing on French cuisine with real Brazilian character, is owned by Alessandra Montagne. She works to reduce her carbon footprint and waste, while filling her kitchen with the smell and taste of her childhood.

programme.title: Planet Chef

programme.title: Planet Chef

programme.title: Planet Chef
programme.desc: Focusing on Greek dishes, with a natural French technique, Mikaela Liaroustos runs Etsi, a place that's all about sharing. She describes cooking as being similar to dancing, having a perpetual rhythm that drives her forward.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Throughout history, the earth has been bombarded from space. Asteroid impacts have caused mass extinctions – including the dinosaur wipe out.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Saturn is the second-largest planet in the solar system. Storms on this gas giant can cover an area bigger than the United States Clouds of the gas race around the planet at over 1000 miles per hour generating fierce electrical storms and lightning.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Superflares are amongst the greatest events of the Universe. These magnetic explosions can release energy millions of times greater than atomic bombs. They produce streams of highly energetic particles which can be highly destructive to life.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Danger, Asteroids Ahead
programme.desc: The threat of an asteroid strike is a very real danger in our solar system, mankind is now in a position to defend the planet from such an eventuality.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Atmosphere
programme.desc: Our atmosphere is an unbelievably complex machine that protects us from the vacuum of space, shelters us from harmful radiation and allows us and the biosphere to breath; we need to learn much more about it so we can better it.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Living Planet
programme.desc: We have been observing Earth for 40 years now, in the last 20 we have focus with intensity on the planet with new technologies and capabilities, we have accumulated a mass of data that is now revealing a complex and ever changing living planet.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Return to the Moon
programme.desc: The moon is our closest celestial companion. It lights our night sky and gently tugs at our shores. Few have walked on her surface, but her allure remains strong.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Moons of Olympus
programme.desc: There are many more worlds in our solar system than just the planets. The mysterious moons of the gas giants may hold much more than we ever imagined. Each one is unique, and each one deserves a scrutinous eye.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Space: Getting There
programme.desc: The new surge in space transportation, privately owned companies vying for government contracts and private entrepreneurs looking to build hotels in space.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: This is the latest in Martian exploration, not just from orbit but also from rovers on the ground. New sources of water and planetary dust storms are a few of the stories unfolding on the Red Planet.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier

programme.desc: Before spaceflight aviators began wearing pressure suits to allow them to function at higher ceilings.

programme.title: Zenith – Advances In Space Exploration

programme.title: Zenith – Advances In Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Sun is our star. Its energy enables life on the Earth to thrive yet we know so little about the solar weather and the 11 year solar cycle.

programme.title: Zenith – Advances In Space Exploration

programme.title: Zenith – Advances In Space Exploration

programme.title: Zenith – Advances In Space Exploration

programme.title: Zenith – Advances In Space Exploration

programme.title: Zenith – Advances In Space Exploration

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Hot Matches

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Love, Totodile Style

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Fowl Play

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: The Psychic Sidekicks

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: The Fortune Hunters

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions

programme.desc: Sure, sure, we know what you're thinking. Laser Mission? What kind of a thing is that to make a movie about? Everybody's been on a laser mission. Just trust us when we tell you, this one is special.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Superheroes!
programme.desc: Welcome to RiffTrax Shorts: Superheroes, three short films that teach us it takes more than tights and a cape to be a superhero. Sometimes, it takes a Mylar jumpsuit and a garbage can lid. Featuring Batman, Measuring Man, and Safety Woman!

programme.title: RiffTrax: Miami Connection
programme.desc: If you put everything about the 80s in a blender, then somehow ran that through a translator that only speaks languages from another dimension, what you'd wind up with still wouldn't be half as hilarious, weird, and oddly charming as Miami Connection.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Samurai Cop
programme.desc: Decapitations, explosions, poorly subbed in stunt doubles, mangled dialogue, prominent lion heads, and unfortunate banana hammocks abound in this extremely 80s-y 90s movie. Join Mike, Kevin, Bill, and Alfonso Rafael Federico Sebastian for Samurai Cop!

programme.title: RiffTrax: Santa and the Ice Cream Bunny
programme.desc: What is an Ice Cream Bunny? We're not quite sure, and the movie doesn't really bother to explain. Evidently he has a fire truck with an air raid siren, and lives at a place called Pirates World.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Christmas with RiffTrax featuring Magic Christmas Tree
programme.desc: Join your hosts, Mike Nelson, Kevin Murphy, and Bill Corbett, as they exchange gifts, with vintage toy commercials. Magic Christmas Tree is a fresh slice of holiday weird, sure to bring back cherished childhood memories.

programme.title: Total Riff Off Episode 2: Demon Bat
programme.desc: A giant demon bat is terrorizing a Mexican village! Well, it’s actual fairly normal sized, as far as bats go. It’s really no more a demon than any other bat, now that you mention it.

programme.title: Total Riff Off Episode 3: Guy and a Goose
programme.desc: Meet Dominic. He’s in love with a goose. What’s that? You’ll be right back after you alert the authorities? We completely understand.

programme.title: Total Riff Off Episode 4: Man V. Monster
programme.desc: Never one to let something like “not finding the made up creature we all knew never existed in the first place” discourage him, monster hunter Richard Terry is back on the prowl again!

programme.title: Total Riff Off Episode 5: Animals Behaving Badly
programme.desc: No matter where you stand on weird wacky animals and the moral quality of their behavior, you’ll be happy you joined Mike, Kevin and Bill for this hilarious riff of Animals Behaving Badly!

programme.title: Total Riff Off Episode 6: Brazilian Bigfoot
programme.desc: Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for another baffling snipe hunt with our favorite intrepid explorer Richard Terry in Total Riff Off Episode 6: Brazilian Bigfoot!

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: A grief-stricken Piper and Leo attend a Hindu wedding, where they inadvertently receive the powers of Hindu gods, and it's up to Phoebe and Paige to keep them from consummating their love in order to save the universe.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Charmed Ones have their hands full, when thanks to a bored Magic School student, they must keep Lord Dyson from killing the infamous Lady Godiva before she can travel back in time and complete her famous ride.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When Paige and Phoebe summon Grams for Chris' Wiccaning, Grams puts a spell on the children to try to end their sibling rivalry, but instead it reverts the sisters back to bickering teenagers.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When Paige encounters Captain Black Jack Cutting, an 18th century pirate in search of the Fountain of Youth, the curse on his life becomes her problem. Meanwhile, Leslie manipulates a contest in order to spend time with Phoebe.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: In an attempt to stop a demon on a murderous rampage upon his human relatives, Paige casts a spell that inadvertently blocks all death, and it's up to the Charmed Ones to make things right, when the Angel of Death wants the mess cleaned up.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: A blue moon causes problems right after the Elders', suspicious of Leo, assign the sisters a new whitelighter. Meanwhile, Agent Brody tells Paige of a powerful new threat, and Phoebe and Leslie confess their true feelings for each other.

programme.desc: The Avatars enlist Leo to protect the Seer because she has information that could help them destroy the demons. Meanwhile, Brody reveals a secret to Paige, and Phoebe and Darryl continue to investigate Brody.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When Piper switches powers with Phoebe, to allow her to see the vision of the utopian world, Zankou interferes, and causes their powers to be transferred to innocent bystanders, who run amok.

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín le aconseja a Norma que se case con Juan, quien sueña vivir con ella y el niño como una familia. Rosario se le atraviesa con el carro a Franco y él la rechaza, Gabriela pacta con Dínora.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Rosario se propone reconquistar a Franco, lo que ella no sabe es que Armando piensa en acabar con él en la fiesta. A las hijas y al padre de Gabriela les extraña su nueva amistad con Dínora.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: En la fiesta, Franco cubre a Sara con piropos y la acompaña al carro, ella ve cuando lo secuestran. Jimena coquetea con un invitado para darle celos a Óscar mientras Norma confronta a su madre.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Hugo sufre un ataque de catalepsia al caer en el río por tratar de rescatar a Beatriz, el médico intenta revivirlo. El doctor Max sigue a Boris y a Marina, está decidido a despejar su duda.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Hugo quiere marcharse para encontrar la cura de su enfermedad, pero Beatriz amenaza con quitarse la vida. Hércules, el novio de Rebeca, está dispuesto a matar a Lucas, los celos lo enloquecen.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Enrico le entrega a Soledad una flor especial para que ella la cuide, mientras Hugo parece encontrar la cura para su enfermedad. Marina comete imprudencias que pueden alejar a Hugo de Boris.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Soledad se prende en llamas por culpa de su tía, Hugo cae en una condición que Boris no entiende. Esther trata de buscar a Lucas en la taberna, pero se encuentra con una penosa sorpresa.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Pasa el tiempo. David está más unido a su abuela y hay dos niños más en la casa. Patricia, frustrada por la ausencia de sexo con su esposo, termina besándose con Alejandro, quien, a su vez, detesta a su esposa.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Por orden del senador Villegas, Gabriela sale del aislamiento y está desconectada de la realidad. Ricardo pelea con su padre y también con Antonia. Ahora intenta reabrir el caso de Gabriela Suárez. Alejandro lo apoya. Irene se muere de celos.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Cuatros años de encierro dejan a Gabriela muy afectada. Alejandro y Ricardo trabajan para reabrir el caso y quedan impresionados al verla. Constanza la protege. Lucho se hace pasar por loco para estar cerca de Gabriela y quiere ayudarla a escapar.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Lucho Vampa se gana la confianza de Gabriela. Ella reacciona bien, dando muestras de sanidad. Patricia y Alejandro se hacen amantes. Constanza recibe una herencia millonaria. Milagros se brinda para llevarle una carta a Ricardo, pero es interceptada.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: En la fiesta, Franco cubre a Sara con piropos y la acompaña al carro, ella ve cuando lo secuestran. Jimena coquetea con un invitado para darle celos a Óscar mientras Norma confronta a su madre.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara arriesga su vida para salvar a Franco de los matones, él le agradece con un beso. Jimena llega a la casa tras burlarse de Óscar y se preocupa por su hermana, a ambas les espera un regaño.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma acude a su cita con Juan, pero se va al ver que no está solo, Óscar enfrenta a Jimena delante de Gabriela, quien se indigna al saber lo sucedido. Franco busca desquitarse de los matones.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The remaining teams set off from their Pit Stop in Stechelberg in the Burmese Alps and receive a clue instructing them to fly to Munich, Germany and then drive to Ruhpolding, where they will ride a cable car to the top of the mountain.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The remaining teams set off from the Pit Stop at the Schloss Hellbrunn in Salzburg, Austria and receive a clue instructing them to travel by train to Munich and then fly 700 miles to Bucharest, Romania.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The eight remaining teams set off from the Vila Panoramic and receive a clue instructing them to fly through Moscow to Krasnoyarsk, Siberia and then travel to the hydroelectric dam depicted on the back of Russia's ten ruble note.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Having shaken off the shock of the fourth elimination, the seven remaining teams set off from their Pit Stop at the Theater of Musical Comedy in Krasnoyarsk, Siberia, Russia, and receive a clue instructing them to ride the Trans-Siberian Railway.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The seven remaining teams depart from their Pit Stop at the Siberian Colosseum, leaving the cold of Siberia and flying nearly 2,000 miles to the heat of Jaipur, India.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The six remaining teams set off from the Jaigur Fort in Jaipur, India and receive a clue instructing them to fly nearly 2,000 miles to Phuket, Thailand.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The remaining five teams take off from their Pit Stop at the Wat Thep Nimit Temple in Phuket, Thailand and receive a clue instructing them to fly over 400 miles to Bangkok, Thailand.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The five remaining teams set off from the eighth Pit Stop at a royal palace in Bangkok, Thailand and receive a clue instructing them to travel over 1,000 miles to Guilin, China.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams set off from their Pit Stop at the park of the Sun and Moon Pagodas in Guilin, China and receive a clue instructing them to fly north, over 1,000 miles, to Beijing.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The remaining four teams learn that the destination that they have reached is not a Pit Stop and they are still racing. They search the area shops of a Bei Hei streets for a Travelocity roaming gnome, which they must keep until the leg's Pit Stop.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In the fourteenth season's finale, the final three teams set off from their Pit Stop at the Bird's Nest Stadium in Beijing, China and travel over 5,000 miles to Maui, Hawaii.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Twelve Teams stand at the start line in Los Angeles, Calif., but only 11 will make the journey to Tokyo, Japan as the Racers are faced with a heart-breaking surprise elimination.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams struggle to combat the hectic pace of Vietnam and one Team puts their own Race in jeopardy by offering to help the competition.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie and his friend find an abandoned baby and they run into trouble when they innocently try to find it some new parents.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Town clerk Howard, a novice fisherman, tags along on the first day of the season and antagonizes the town's anglers by catching Old Sam, the legendary fish in the lake.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Otis and Howard nearly botch rescuing Andy who has been taken prisoner by a pair of desperate bank robbers.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Inarticulate Goober grows a beard and suddenly turns into a verbose philosopher.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The town's new doctor is shunned by all the Mayberry citizens until Andy shows his faith in the young physician by letting him remove Opie's tonsils.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and four of his levelheaded friends and relatives are taken in by a con man's get-rich-quick scheme.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy looks forward to eating a few snacks and spending an evening alone in the house but he finds he must eat three spaghetti dinners cooked by thoughtful friends.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy visits Barney Fife, now with the Raleigh police department, and makes a hero out of his bumbling former deputy.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Detective Barney Fife pays a visit to his old hometown, the same day a glamorous movie star returns to Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy's perennial romance with Helen is jolted a bit when Andy's old high school sweetheart moves back to town.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee allows her superstitions dictate her decision to be a brief co-owner of a Chinese restaurant.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Floyd decides to give up his Mayberry barbershop when Howard Sprague buys the building and raises the rent fifteen dollars a month.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Aunt Bee learn their ancestor was the state's biggest swindler, just before the town of Mayberry unveils his statue as a hero.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Helen writes a children's book that will be published and Andy faces the uncomfortable prospect of being the fiance of a famous writer.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Opie face the difficult problem of helping an old milk-wagon horse find contentment in retirement.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie insists on studying piano until he finds out that football practice and piano practice conflict.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Staid Howard Sprague becomes a comedian and gets on a TV amateur hour.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Howard volunteers to become the Big Brother of a high school boy.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy is distressed when Opie receives a failing grade for his school essay naming him his most unforgettable character.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Goober faces disaster when a printing error awards Floyd a large cash prize in his gas station contest.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Mary Alice Carter accepts Opie's invitation to a party but rejects him at the eleventh hour for another.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Howard, a last minute substitution for a bowling team sponsored by Emmett's fix-it shop, astonishes everyone by bowling a perfect game.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee goes to Mexico with her two best friends but the trip tests their friendship.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy doesn't tell Helen that the lawyer he worked with in Raleigh is a beautiful woman.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy sends Opie to an affluent boys' camp.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Howard begins dating Millie but her ex-boyfriend still carries a torch and threatens him.

programme.desc: The beach is such a lovely sight as afternoon comes to an end - Bob Ross paints this seascape with gold, purple and orange hues.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The versatility of Bob Ross's easy method is dramatically illustrated by this mighty tide crashing into a rock-lined shore.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: The colorful Milky Way is the backdrop for striking silhouettes of happy little Bob Ross trees in this night scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Experience the mystique of snowflakes gently tumbling in the silence of the forest. Join Bob Ross for this lovely winter masterpiece!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: What a delicate view of polar beauty; Bob Ross taps his brushes to make subtle hills, sleeping grasses, and leafless trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A path of cacti and rocks lead right up to a bold sun setting in a dramatic red sky, all from the delicate motions of Bob Ross' paint brush.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Follow along with Bob Ross as he takes you into the incredible beauty of the dry lands. A unique oval painting for beginners and accomplished artists as well.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints a breathtakingly beautiful seascape on black canvas today, complete with fierce skies, jagged cliff and raging ocean waves.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: It's almost fall, and Bob Ross captures the undaunted power and charm of a mighty brown mountain surveying its rustic surroundings.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross captures the stillness of cold darkness and rests a cozy little cabin atop a snow-covered hill - a real black canvas favorite.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.desc: Paint along with Bob Ross and discover the beauty of a secluded log home with only quiet pond and rustic trees for companionship.

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The Good Fight
programme.desc: After landing tech mogul Neil Gross as a new client, the firm is tasked with finding a way to combat hate speech on his social media. Series finale streaming only on Paramount+ on 9/8.

programme.title: The Good Fight

programme.title: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Founding partner, Carl Reddick, makes a surprise return to the firm. A renowned pastor needs the firm's help in a legal matter that threatens to ruin his legacy. Lucca unexpectedly meets Colin's parents. Series finale streaming only on Paramount+ on 9/8.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia manages the fallout when her client's insensitive statements to the press threaten the fate of a multi-billion dollar merger. Meanwhile, Diane faces a potential conflict of interest.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: An open feed from a camera mistakenly left on after a teleconferenced deposition between the lawyers of Florrick/Agos and Lockhart/Gardner reveals a threat to the firm that Alicia and Cary never saw coming.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia is adamant in her refusal to run for State's Attorney despite Eli's attempts to persuade her to launch a campaign. Meanwhile, Diane considers joining Florrick/Agos as partner.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia scrambles to hold onto Florrick/Agos' biggest client as the firm continues to struggle with an internal legal crisis. Meanwhile, Diane continues to plot her move from Lockhart/Gardner and looks for partners to bring with her to the new firm.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Cary's freedom lies in the hands of his pretrial service officer, Joy Grubick, as she interviews his colleagues to determine whether or not he should remain behind bars. Meanwhile, Alicia and Dean find themselves in unfamiliar territory.

programme.title: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Diane and Adrian find themselves involved in another police brutality case, this time representing a surprising but familiar face, Colin Sweeney. Series finale streaming only on Paramount+ on 9/8.

programme.title: The Good Wife

programme.title: The Good Fight
programme.desc: An unfortunate event brings the firm together, along with the prospect of a new partner, Liz Reddick-Lawrence. Meanwhile, Diane struggles with the insanity of the world. Series finale streaming only on Paramount+ on 9/8.

programme.title: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Tensions remain high when the firm learns another Chicago lawyer has been murdered by a client. Liz has her first day at Reddick, Boseman and Lockhart and positions herself as a potential ally for Diane. Series finale streaming only on Paramount+ on 9/8.

programme.title: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Reddick, Boseman and Lockhart represent a young woman who was assaulted while a contestant on the reality dating show "Chicago Penthouse." Diane fears she might be the next "Kill All Lawyers" target. Series finale streaming only on Paramount+ on 9/8.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Wet & Wild
programme.desc: Bring your towel along for today’s wet and wild adventure! From the biggest fish in the sea, the whale shark, to sea lions, sperm whales, tiger sharks, and more. Find out which is number one, as Jack becomes your guide to the mysteries of the deep!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Cold blooded creatures all need warmth to survive, but they can be found some in some very different habitats. Come along with Jack as he crisscrosses the globe to meet stingrays, giant tortoises, scorpions, thorny devils and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets the lucky creatures that are cared for by some of the most interesting veterinarians from across the world. Koalas, Cheetahs, Gorillas, Dogs, Eland, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for an underground adventure with Bats, Bears, Wombats, Rosy Bee-Eaters, and Iguanas.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack gets a special behind-the-scenes look at a retirement home for chimpanzees where caregivers have rescued over 250 chimps that now live in large family groups on specially designed islands in Florida.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Tampa, more than 200 unwanted, abused animals, most of them exotic cats, have it made for the rest of their lives at the sanctuary on Easy Street. Jack finds out from the founder of Wildlife on Easy Street that caring for 17 species of cats.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's heading to the southern tip of Chile to bring you this adventure. Kicking off this trip in a town that pays serious homage to the famous explorer Magellan, Jack boards a boat for Magdalena Island home to a breeding colony of Magellanic Penguins.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack and his daughter Kathleen share a boating adventure exploring the animal-rich rainforest surrounding the Panama Canal, including Howler and Capuchin monkeys and the deadly Fer de Lance snake.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's heading back to school! Join in as he meets up with the zookeepers of tomorrow at the Santa Fe Teaching Zoo in Gainesville, Fla. where he gets a lesson in training a kookaburra, shifting a trio of Galapagos tortoises, and a whole lot more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack visits a local market in a Peruvian jungle town to get a first-hand look at how the illegal pet trade is threatening many native species. Then he and Sue meet a man who's making a big difference for hundreds of primates on Monkey Island.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: The Atacama Desert in northern Chile is known as the highest and driest desert in the world. Jack wants to explore it all-from colorful flamingos to rare cats and even a newly discovered species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Join him as he visits some of his favorite aquariums and zoological parks, which are on a mission to help save wildlife. Meet sun bears, moose, sea lion pups, a baby rhino, and other wild animals that are all part of new zoo and aquarium programs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: All of the creatures on today’s countdown are livin’ large! Join Jungle Jack as he counts downs the biggest land animals on the planet – hippos, rhinos, elephants and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he samples some cultural delicacies on his way to discovering amazing creatures, like Spider Monkeys, Sloths, Rhinoceros Beetles, Proboscis Monkeys, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Panama's coastal town of Pedasi is a haven for sea creatures. Jack encounters a nesting Sea Turtle, before visiting Isla Iguana where he searches for Black Iguanas, a colony of Frigate Birds, and a whole lot more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Once known as the breadbasket of Africa, Zimbabwe is home to some of the most iconic wildlife on the continent. But, drought, poaching, and a lack of resources have left many species fighting for survival.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Bottoms Up
programme.desc: Jungle Jack goes to the ends of the Earth to meet nature's most captivating creatures! Today, adventures from the frigid waters of South America to elephant country in Africa and all the way up to Alaska's Glacier Bay.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Take a trip with Jack and the Hanna family to Bruny Island in Tasmania. See an all-white wallaby, watch wild fur seals at play and go on a thrilling boat ride on the Tasman Sea that ends with a surprise dolphin encounter.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he gets a rare behind-the-scenes look at the daily life of the Maasai in a village in Tanzania. Then Jack encounters Hippos, Jackals, Hartebeest, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Joel give a very lucky animal at a local shelter a new lease on life and a starring role in Joel's new show. And, if you thought training dogs and cats was challenging, check out Jack trying to train lemurs, kangaroos and whole lot more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is heading into devil country in Tasmania, Australia to meet up with leading-edge researchers who are working to save Tasmanian Devils from a deadly cancer that is wiping out the population.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Living Fossils
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets some of the most ancient species living on Earth. Red pandas, hoatzins, koalas, crocodiles and pelicans!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In South Africa, Jack checks out the endangered species breeding program at Sable Ranch. Jack's ranch adventures include a helicopter round up of sable and roan antelope, as well as the trans-location of a white rhino.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is lending a hand to Shamwari's world-renowned veterinarians and anti-poaching unit as they work on the front lines of conservation in South Africa.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his family are visiting a few of the special people that are doing their part to make a difference. From protecting the world's largest land mammal to the fastest…check out the story of the Knysna Elephant Park and Cheetah Outreach Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a journey down south to Florida's Everglades where he meets gators, snakes, and other creatures from the swamp.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Rebounding
programme.desc: Meet six amazing animals rallying from the brink of extinction. Bald eagles, American alligators, Florida manatees, Peregrine falcons and more.

programme.desc: Jamie Oliver prepares super-fast beef hash with jacket potatoes, goddess salad and lovely butter beans and bacon.

programme.desc: A post-match meal for rugby players; chicken in milk; proper polenta; panettone bread-and-butter pudding.

programme.desc: Risotto; tuna steaks; chocolate tart; Jamie offers three women boyfriend advice.

programme.desc: Jamie cooks paella for the friends who helped redecorate his kitchen.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
